rulings.Case Title: CHERONN RASHIDA JOHNSON et al VS. WARREN FOSTER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Re-Notice Of Motion To Have Trhuth Of Matters Deemed Admitted And Request For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, July 1, 2013, line 2. PLAINTIFF CHERONN JOHNSON's Amended Re-Notice Of Motion To Have Truth Of Matters Deemed Admitted And Request For Monetary Sanctions DENIED. Responses to Request for Admissions have been provided prior to hearing. Sanctions are granted in the amount of $550. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SHING KIT LEE et al VS. CHARLEMAGNE EVANGELISTA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Terminating Or Issue Sanctions Against Deft For Failure To Comply With Court Order Of April 12-2013 Comelling Further Responses To Special Interrogatories
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, July 1, 2013, line 3. PLAINTIFF SHING LEE and JULIE LEE's Motion For Terminating Or Issue Sanctions Against Deft For Failure To Comply With Court Order Of April 12-2013 Comelling Further Responses To Special Interrogatories GRANTED as follows: (1) Defendant shall comply with this Court's April 12, 2013 Order and provide further response to written discovery; and (2) Defendant shall respond to Request for Production within 5 days of notice of entry of this Order. Sanctions are granted in the amount of $1,285 to be paid to plaintiff's counsel within 30 days. = (501/REQ)
